resources.string: Choose image or video wallpapers for every card on the Home page.
Set the large status card wallpaper.
Customize status monitor and system info cards.
Module wallpaper synced to theme store
EpkeSU currently supports GKI kernels only. Patch the boot image on a GKI device to continue.
Manager version (%1$d) and EpkeSU driver version (%2$d) mismatch.
Granted root access via EpkeSU ioctl
The following modules will be installed: %1$s
Are you sure you want to uninstall module %s?
Are you sure you want to uninstall module %s? This action will affect all modules, and certain features provided by the metamodule (such as mounting) will no longer work.
Jailbreak may have failed, please check logs
Module installation is disabled in safe mode
Modules are unavailable due to a conflict with Magisk!
Learn how to install EpkeSU and use modules.
EpkeSU is, and always will be, free, and open source. However, you can show us that you care by making a donation.
Starting from v3.0.0, the GKI work mode will be used only in testing environments. We do not recommend it for daily use, and image files will no longer be provided.
EpkeSU is active, but this app is not recognized as the manager by the kernel. Reinstall the matching Manager APK or rebuild the kernel with this app signature.

View source code at %1$s
Join our %2$s channel
Failed to update App Profile for %s
Manager uapi version (%1$d) and EpkeSU driver uapi version (%2$d) mismatch.
The current EpkeSU manager version %1$d is too low for EpkeSU to work properly. Please upgrade manager to version %2$d or higher!
The current EpkeSU version %1$d is too low for the manager to work properly. Please upgrade to version %2$d or higher!
The global default value for \"Umount modules\" in App Profile. If enabled, it will remove all module modifications to the system for apps that don\'t have a profile set.
Install and enable the built-in Hybrid Mount Lite metamodule.
Choose the global Hybrid Mount default mode.
Open Hybrid Mount WebUI to edit module and path rules.
Enable built-in mount and reboot first to open Hybrid Mount WebUI.
Reboot to apply built-in mount changes.
Enabling this option will allow EpkeSU to restore any modified files by the modules for this app.
Module action failed with exit code %d.
New version %s is available, click to upgrade!
Failed to update SELinux rules for %s
Manage local and online template of App Profile.
Cannot find local template to export!
Automatically check for updates when opening the app.
Automatically check installed modules for available updates.
Show a warning when the Manager and EpkeSU driver versions do not match.
This is a PR debug build. Do NOT use it in production!
The kernel was built with PR signature support. This is not a production kernel!
Can be used to debug WebUI. Please enable only when needed.
Your device will be **FORCED** to boot to the current inactive slot after a reboot!\nOnly use this option after OTA is done.\nContinue?

You are in **Jailbreak mode**. Flashing a partition on a device with a **locked bootloader** will break AVB (Android Verified Boot) and may cause the device to **fail to boot**.\n\nMake sure your bootloader is unlocked before proceeding!
Android 13+ or some newer devices should use init_boot; older devices should use boot.
Temporarily uninstall EpkeSU, restore to original state after next reboot.
Uninstalling EpkeSU (root and all modules) completely and permanently.
Restore the stock factory image (if a backup exists), usually used before OTA; if you need to uninstall EpkeSU, please use \"Uninstall permanently\".
Allow root access via /system/bin/su, in new processes.
Unmount modules from kernel in App Profile.
Prevent applications from detecting SELinux modifications
Record root-related events into EpkeSU sulog files.
Hide KernelSU SELinux domains in AVC audit logs.
Kernel does not support this feature
This feature is managed by a module
Leave empty to use the default app name.
Choose the launcher icon shown on the home screen.
Tap an icon to switch the launcher icon shown on the home screen.
Custom app icon shortcut created on desktop
Switch back to the default launcher icon.
Built-in icons replace the launcher icon. Custom images are added as a cropped desktop shortcut.
Customize the navigation icons for Home, Superuser, Modules, and Settings.
Choose a square image as the icon for this navigation item.
Custom icon selected. Tap to choose another image.
裁剪超级用户导航图标
预览超级用户导航图标
The cropped icon will appear like this in the navigation bar.
Set a global background or override Home, Superuser, Modules, and Settings individually.
Used across the app unless a page has its own background.
Custom backgrounds here override the global background only on that page.
Applies to every page without an override.
Overrides the global background on this page.
Choose an image or video for the app background.
Adjust how visible the custom background is.
Choose an image for the app background.
Wallpaper selected. Tap to choose another image.
Adjust how visible the custom wallpaper is.
Drag the frame to choose which part of the image is shown.
Draw the wallpaper lightly above UI surfaces.
Control how strongly the wallpaper passes through the UI.
The custom wallpaper is shown across the whole app.
Choose a video for the app background.
Video background selected. Tap to choose another video.
Restart the background video after the selected time.
Import or export a theme pack with backgrounds, icons, and startup media.
Bundle home card wallpapers, global and page image or video backgrounds, startup sound, and startup animation into one .kstheme file.
Theme pack exported, but some media files could not be included.
Selected. Export will include this media file.
选择一个音频文件，在应用启动时播放。
已选择启动音效，点击可重新选择。
到达设定时间后自动停止播放。
无法播放这个启动音效。
选择一个音频文件，点击界面控件时播放。
已选择点击音效，点击可重新选择。
无法播放这个点击音效。
管理启动音效、点击音效和背景音乐。
选择一个音频文件，在应用打开时循环播放。
已选择背景音乐，点击可重新选择。
无法播放这个背景音乐。
Choose an image, GIF, or video file to show when the app starts.
Startup animation selected. Tap to choose another file.
Unable to play this startup animation.
Adjust app text size without changing the whole system.
Control the strength of blur and glass surfaces.
Store the current colors and appearance controls as a reusable preset.
Tap to apply this saved theme.
Choose whether theme settings are shared across UI styles.
Reset the current UI style to its default appearance.
Current settings have been adjusted manually.
Neutral surfaces, low visual noise, and focused controls.
System wallpaper color with restrained Material accents.
Dark dynamic palette, blur, and liquid floating navigation.
浅色全局液态玻璃，覆盖顶栏、卡片、列表和控件。
SKRoot(Pro)-style purple controls, light surfaces, and a floating bottom bar.
Magisk Alpha-inspired light gray cards, bold text, blue controls, and a fixed bottom bar.
Delta-style light surfaces, green pill controls, rounded cards, and a floating bottom bar.

Ignore network-wide detection methods, achieve SELinux zero-touch and no mount. Patch the stock kernel directly without source code and preserve official kernel features. Module features: self-developed kernel Hook framework, zero performance loss, no side-channel traces. Dynamic kernel offset search for true cross-kernel operation.
Tap top-right \"+\" to add su grant
AMOLED black, monochrome tones, and denser system panels.
Launcher does not support desktop shortcuts
Please enable \"Home screen shortcuts\" permission for this app in Xiaomi settings.
Please enable \"Create Home screen shortcuts\" permission for this app in OPPO settings.
If shortcut creation fails, please enable desktop shortcut permission for this app in system settings.
Module %s is disabled, updating, or pending removal
Please select the GKI device image file you want to patch!
Enable blur effect for top and bottom bars.
Use Apple style floating bottom bar.
启用悬浮底栏的液态玻璃效果。
Automatically use Magica to escalate privileges when Permissive SELinux is detected at boot. Requires granting autostart permission to this app.
Theme, icons, background, and startup effects
su, umount, SELinux, logs, and adb root
Always allow adb shell to call su. Do not enable this unless absolutely necessary.
Force enable USB debugging and disable adb authentication. Do not enable this unless absolutely necessary.
Run adbd daemon with root privileges
Prevent further privilege escalation via EpkeSU from within the context of this root profile.
